name: Factor 5
description: German-American developer known for Turrican, Super Turrican, Mega Turrican, and the Star Wars: Rogue Squadron games.

eras.title: Turrican Era
eras.description: Factor 5 becomes known for technically polished Amiga and console action games, especially Turrican.

eras.title: Star Wars Era
eras.description: The studio becomes closely associated with LucasArts through the Rogue Squadron games.
